report_title: OFR Issue Tracker - Weekly Risk Report

issues.Title: Cross-border data transfer compliance gap
issues.NextAction: Review with legal team by Feb 28

Updates.Notes: Legal review scheduled for Feb 28. EU counsel confirmed scope of GDPR Article 46 analysis.
Identified three additional cross-border data flows requiring assessment.
Raised following internal audit of EU-US data transfer mechanisms.
Escalated to partner level. Vendor has not responded to two assessment requests.
Second request sent to vendor. Response deadline set for Jan 22.
Annual risk assessment for critical Tier 1 vendor now 30 days overdue.

issues.Title: KYC refresh cycle for high-risk clients

Updates.Notes: Batch 2 complete (12 clients). Batch 3 of 8 high-risk clients in progress.
Batch 1 complete. Began batch 2 covering financial services clients.
Draft framework 60% complete. Awaiting input from data science team on model risk classification.
Commenced gap analysis against NIST AI RMF. Initial findings documented.
Identified gaps in current AI model governance following regulatory guidance update.

issues.Title: Contract template non-compliance with new regulations

Updates.Notes: Updated templates deployed to 8 of 10 practice groups. Remaining 2 scheduled for next week.
Template revisions approved by OGC. Rollout plan finalised.

issues.Title: Privacy impact assessment backlog
issues.NextAction: Clear 5 outstanding PIAs by month end

Updates.Notes: 3 of 8 PIAs completed. Prioritising remaining 5 by regulatory deadline.
Backlog of 8 PIAs identified across three business units.

issues.Title: Internal audit finding remediation delay
issues.NextAction: Present remediation plan to audit committee

Updates.Notes: Escalated after second missed remediation deadline. Audit committee briefing requested.
Remediation owner confirmed revised timeline. New target: Jan 31.
Two high-priority audit findings from Q3 review remain unresolved past 90-day deadline.
Process review initiated for upcoming clearance renewal cycle (12 staff affected).

issues.Title: General counsel advisory on M&A due diligence
issues.NextAction: Complete legal review of target entity

Updates.Notes: Preliminary review of target entity corporate structure complete. IP portfolio assessment underway.
Advisory engagement initiated for potential acquisition target.

issues.Title: Independence conflict check automation
issues.NextAction: Evaluate pilot results and report findings

Updates.Notes: Pilot running with 3 engagement teams. Early results show 40% reduction in manual checks.
Automation tool deployed to pilot group. Training completed for 15 users.

issues.Title: Risk appetite statement annual refresh
issues.NextAction: Circulate draft to leadership for comment

Updates.Notes: Draft risk appetite statement updated to reflect new regulatory landscape. Pending leadership review.
Commenced review of current risk appetite thresholds against FY26 strategy.
Root cause analysis complete. 3 corrective actions identified; implementation plan drafted.
QC review identified 7 engagement letters with missing or incorrect scope clauses.
Quality control review flagged engagement letter deficiencies in two service lines.

issues.Title: Client onboarding documentation gaps
issues.NextAction: Review and assign to KYC analyst

Updates.Notes: Identified missing beneficial ownership documentation for 4 recently onboarded clients.

issues.Title: Cybersecurity incident response plan update
issues.NextAction: Incorporate lessons from Q4 tabletop exercise

Updates.Notes: Lessons learned from Q4 tabletop exercise documented. Updating IRP sections 3, 5, and 7.
Annual review of incident response plan triggered. Q4 tabletop highlighted 4 improvement areas.
Regulatory mapping underway for 6 priority jurisdictions. EU and UK complete.
Initiated analysis of cross-border privacy regulation impacts following new APAC requirements.

issues.Title: Firm-wide risk register consolidation initiative
issues.NextAction: Merge regional registers into unified view

Updates.Notes: 3 of 5 regional registers mapped to unified taxonomy. APAC and EMEA remain.
Initiative launched to consolidate five separate regional risk registers into one firm-wide view.

issues.Title: Contract renewal risk for critical vendor
issues.NextAction: Negotiate revised SLA terms by March 1

Updates.Notes: Vendor proposed revised SLA terms received. Under review by procurement and legal.
Critical infrastructure vendor contract expires March 15. Renewal negotiations required.

issues.Title: Audit committee reporting format standardization
issues.NextAction: Draft proposed template for committee review

Updates.Notes: Standardisation needed after committee feedback on inconsistent reporting formats across regions.
